title: Dutch Pan-Seared Peppery Steak
description: A simple yet flavorful gluten-free recipe featuring seared peppery steak served with sautéed onions.

ingredients.name: Peppery Steak
ingredients.notes: Choose a peppery cut of beef, such as a flank steak

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet onion, such as a Vidalia

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral-tasting oil, such as canola or grapeseed

instructions: Season the steaks with salt and pepper.
Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions to the skillet and cook until they are caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Remove the onions from the skillet and set them aside.
Add the steaks to the skillet and sear them for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they reach your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the steaks to a plate and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the steaks with the caramelized onions.
